## Cost Benchmarks

| Metric | Benchmark |
|--------|-----------|
| Full restoration cost/m² | TODO: £2,500–£4,500/m² for full listed building restoration (NI, 2023–24) |
| Partial refurbishment cost/m² | TODO: £1,200–£2,000/m² for partial refurbishment |
| Listed building uplift | TODO: typically +25–40% vs standard construction |
| Contingency norm | 20–30% of construction cost for heritage projects |

---

## Elemental Cost Breakdown

| Element | Benchmark Cost |
|---------|---------------|
| Roof (slate, heritage spec) | TODO: £180–£350/m² for slate re-roofing with heritage materials |
| Sash windows | TODO: £800–£2,500 per sash window repair/replacement (heritage spec) |
| Masonry / repointing | TODO: £80–£150/m² repointing; £200–£400/m² stonework repair |
| Lime plasterwork | TODO: £60–£120/m² for lime plaster restoration |
| Specialist timber/joinery | TODO: £150–£300/m² specialist timber repairs |
| M&E (mechanical & electrical) | TODO: £200–£400/m² full M&E replacement |
| Access & scaffolding | TODO: significant uplift for multi-storey Victorian houses |
